sections.biography-source-undefined: Han Ran was an official on service to Liu Bei. In 220, he was sent to Wei to send his condolences to Cao Pi. Two accounts report the results; one was that he was killed while another was that he was given a reply.

full_text:
Han Ran 韓冉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Ran (韓冉). Sent as envoy to Wei to offer condolences on Cao Cao’s death, though sources disagree on the mission’s success. Han Ran was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Han Ran lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Han Ran was an official on service to Liu Bei. In 220, he was sent to Wei to send his condolences to Cao Pi. Two accounts report the results; one was that he was killed while another was that he was given a reply.
